commands_added_to_p2p: test_repo_cargo_check - runs 'cargo ck' to verify code compiles
test_repo_cargo_test - runs 'cargo test --all-features' to verify tests pass
test_repo_cargo_lint - runs 'cargo lint -- --deny warnings' to verify no clippy warnings
notes: Dockerfile lacks Rust/Cargo toolchain - only Node.js is installed
The actual CI uses namespace-profile-linux-x64-default runners with full Rust toolchain
Added cargo-based p2p tests that require Dockerfile fix to pass
pnpm commands not added due to pnpm not being installed in container
Rust commands use cargo aliases defined in .cargo/config.toml: ck, lint
